keys.shortProjectDescription: Unified API layer for monorepo services
keys.problem1: Teams duplicate integration logic across services
keys.currentSolution2: Ad hoc REST endpoints without standards
keys.scale: Affects 40+ microservices across three product lines.
keys.whyNow: Monorepo consolidation makes a shared API layer urgent.
keys.ifUnsolved: Integration debt will compound and block releases.
keys.architectureApproach: Central API gateway with typed SDK generation.
keys.approachReasons: Reduces duplication and enforces contract consistency.
keys.personaBetterment: Engineers ship integrations in hours instead of weeks.
keys.appfireBetterment: Improves retention by reducing customer integration friction.
keys.estimatedImpact: Saves ~200 engineer hours per quarter across teams.
keys.currentState: Prototype gateway exists with two pilot consumers.
